sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif pragmatique + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-format comprehension), then self-audited before commit. Sized larger (12 base exercises, 60 min) to cover three clusters: conditionnel présent (politeness/advice/unconfirmed info/imagined/future-in-the-past) + conditionnel passé (regret/reproach), the three si-hypothesis patterns, and pronouns y/en. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ 3 (Hachette), Dossier 7 (écologie) (le conditionnel; faire des hypothèses; substituer avec les pronoms y et en; thème: débats écologiques). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
